siteDescription_zh: 国内电商与跨境电商最爱的一站式服务平台，汇聚海量电商知识与前沿资讯。
siteDescription_en: The favorite one-stop service platform for domestic and cross-border e-commerce, aggregating massive e-commerce knowledge and cutting-edge news.

tools.description_zh: 限时限惠、收件优惠、SKU折扣、第二件半价、微店装修素材等等..
tools.description_en: Limited-time promotion, discount shipping, SKU discount, second item half price, micro-shop decoration assets, etc.

tools.description_zh: 帮助拼多多商家提升出评率，快速改销量，增加店铺曝光与订单转化率。
tools.description_en: Help Pinduoduo merchants improve rating rate, quickly modify sales, increase exposure and order conversion.

tools.description_zh: 主流网络发货与一件代发平台，安全稳定，自动同步多店铺单号。
tools.description_en: Mainstream network shipping and dropshipping platform, safe and stable, auto-sync multi-store tracking number.

tools.description_zh: 快速获取店铺访客与流量，全自动操作，大幅度提高商铺综合排名与搜索权重。
tools.description_en: Quickly get store visitors and traffic, fully automated, significantly improve comprehensive ranking and search weight.

tools.description_zh: 支持团队发文、成员管理，多账户文章、短视频一键群发，打造高效运营体系。
tools.description_en: Support team publishing, member management, multi-account article/video one-click group sending, build efficient operations.

tools.description_zh: 淘宝/天猫/拼多多等多平台自动铺货，支持批量复制商品，极速开店必备。
tools.description_en: Auto-listing on Taobao/Tmall/Pinduoduo, supports bulk item copy, a must-have for rapid store opening.

tools.description_zh: 抖店拍单工具箱是一款集抖音小店上货、拍单等多功能为一体的电商工具。
tools.description_en: Doudian Printing Toolbox is an e-commerce tool integrating TikTok shop listing, ordering and printing.

tools.description_zh: 主流电商平台商家订单分销代发、一件代发SaaS管理平台，集成厂商家上下游协同。
tools.description_en: Dropshipping SaaS management platform for mainstream e-commerce orders, integrating upstream and downstream collaboration.

tools.description_zh: 尚讯拍单：支持抖音/淘宝/快手等店铺订单拍单，去拼/淘/1688等源头自动发货。
tools.description_en: Shangxun Ordering: supports ordering for Douyin/Taobao/Kuaishou, auto-shipping from Pinduoduo/1688.

tools.description_zh: 线下商家与企业用户订单、运单协同处理SaaS平台，对接多家快递和物流平台。
tools.description_en: SaaS platform for collaborative processing of orders and waybills for offline merchants and enterprise users.

tools.description_zh: 批量订单打印/发货，方便快捷，多店铺批量打单/上货，支持跨平台店铺操作。
tools.description_en: Batch order printing/shipping, convenient and fast, multi-store batch printing/listing, cross-platform support.

tools.description_zh: 淘宝/天猫/淘特平台最具性价比打单发货软件，支持批量打单，高效省心。
tools.description_en: Most cost-effective order printing and shipping software for Taobao/Tmall, supports batch printing.

tools.description_zh: 专业软文短视频分布平台，让广告变得更高效，一站式全网品宣推广，专业写作SEO。
tools.description_en: Professional soft text and short video distribution platform, making advertising more efficient, one-stop PR.

tools.description_zh: 分销订单自动导入、发货单回传，打通厂家与分销商的订单流与信息流。
tools.description_en: Automated distribution order import, shipping list return, bridging order and info flow between factories and distributors.
